In July 2024 I was elected as your Liberal Democrat MP for Epsom & Ewell. I stood to be your MP because like many of you I’d had enough of the economic and political chaos in which we now find ourselves. I have friends locally who are struggling to feed their kids, pay bills, or are stuck on an NHS waiting list. Businesses are going bust while our day-to-day bills are skyrocketing. We've hidden Helen Maguire - Maiden Speech to prevent cookies being set that you haven't consented to. Please enable marketing cookies to see it. Go to YouTube I believe there is a better way. I love this constituency. It is where I spend so much of my time with my friends, family, and running for Epsom and Ewell Harriers Athletic Club. But my husband and I worry about the future for our three teenagers. Will they be able to afford to live in Surrey and get a good job? Will the NHS still be there for them? My career has taken me from serving in the Army in the deserts of Iraq to working with local foodbanks. Now I’m campaigning for change! I believe in a strong economy shaped by Liberal values, personal freedom, and social justice. We deserve better than a government whose political choices have divided our country, with devastating consequences for so many. For decades this constituency had sent a Conservative to Westminster, but the 2024 election results across Surrey showed that many were fed-up with being taken for granted and instead switched to the Lib Dems. We can make real change here! Join our local Liberal Democrat team and help me create a stronger, fairer economy that brings back hope for everyone. Thanks for your support. pages.title: About Helen - Helen Maguire MP
pages.text_excerpt: About Helen - Helen Maguire MP Skip to main content Helen Maguire MP About Helen Contact Helen Helen's Campaigns Helen's Petitions News Newsletter & Sign Up Volunteer Donate Join Donate Join About Helen Primary Care & Cancer Spokesperson Helen on PIP Helen on Local Crime Contact Helen Privacy & Data Policy Social Media Policy Safe Contacts Policy Helen's Campaigns Helen on Epsom & St Helier Helen on Train Frequency Helen on Thames Water Helen on Cost of Living Helen on SEND Helen on Pavement Parking Helen's Petitions Stop The Delays To Epsom & St Helier Increase Our Train Frequency Stop Sewage Dumping End Pavement Parking About Helen I have a longstanding connection to the Epsom & Ewell constituency, spending much of my time in the constituency with friends, family, and running for the Epsom & Ewell Harriers Athletic Club. On 4th July 2024, I became both the first ever female and Liberal Democrat MP for Epsom & Ewell and it is a huge honour to be your local champion. My main priorities include: Improving healthcare Successive Governments have failed to deliver on a long-promised new emergency care hospital. I am committed to securing this vital facility and upgrading Epsom & St Helier district hospitals for the benefit of all local residents. Cost-of-living High inflation, driven by Tory economic policies, has significantly strained families. I am advocating for practical and fair measures that support those most affected and safeguard the area’s economic future. Tackling Surrey's SEND crisis Surrey faces the highest number of tribunals relating to special educational needs in the country. Inadequate SEND provision in Surrey has led to 1,800 children being deprived of education, many while suffering mental health struggles, and has led to soaring numbers of complaints from parents. I am campaigning for a fair deal for students, parents and schools. Protecting our waterways Thames Water has been allowed to pollute the Hogsmill & River Mole with minimal accountability for far too long. I am fighting for a new water regulator that better holds Thames Water to account over their chronic neglect and underinvestment in our waterways, as well as measures that stop you from paying for water bosses' failures. If possible, please use email to contact me . If not, you can also use the phone number or address given below. Always include your full name, address and postcode when emailing, leaving a message or writing to me. I can only take on casework on behalf of people who live within the Epsom & Ewell constituency. Check who your MP is here . Please note urgent cases will be prioritised. I hold regular face-to-face advice surgeries, however I am unable to offer unscheduled face-to-face support for security reasons. pages.text_excerpt: Helen's Campaigns - Helen Maguire MP Skip to main content Helen Maguire MP About Helen Contact Helen Helen's Campaigns Helen's Petitions News Newsletter & Sign Up Volunteer Donate Join Donate Join About Helen Primary Care & Cancer Spokesperson Helen on PIP Helen on Local Crime Contact Helen Privacy & Data Policy Social Media Policy Safe Contacts Policy Helen's Campaigns Helen on Epsom & St Helier Helen on Train Frequency Helen on Thames Water Helen on Cost of Living Helen on SEND Helen on Pavement Parking Helen's Petitions Stop The Delays To Epsom & St Helier Increase Our Train Frequency Stop Sewage Dumping End Pavement Parking My Campaigns From fighting for the future of our local hospitals, supporting families through the cost of living crisis, backing local businesses and calling for cleaner waterways, I'm tackling the issues that matter to you. I'm raising questions in Parliament, meeting with ministers, listening to constituents and engaging with the Government at every opportunity so that we can deliver real change for our amazing constituency of Epsom & Ewell. pages.title: Helen on Pavement Parking - Helen Maguire MP
headings: h2: End Pavement Parking
pages.text_excerpt: Helen on Pavement Parking - Helen Maguire MP Skip to main content Helen Maguire MP About Helen Contact Helen Helen's Campaigns Helen's Petitions News Newsletter & Sign Up Volunteer Donate Join Donate Join About Helen Primary Care & Cancer Spokesperson Helen on PIP Helen on Local Crime Contact Helen Privacy & Data Policy Social Media Policy Safe Contacts Policy Helen's Campaigns Helen on Epsom & St Helier Helen on Train Frequency Helen on Thames Water Helen on Cost of Living Helen on SEND Helen on Pavement Parking Helen's Petitions Stop The Delays To Epsom & St Helier Increase Our Train Frequency Stop Sewage Dumping End Pavement Parking End Pavement Parking People in Epsom, Ewell, Ashtead and Leatherhead are rightly concerned by the number of vehicles, including mopeds and e-vehicles that are parking on pavements in our towns. These pose a risk to residents, especially those with disabilities and the elderly, as well as reducing the amount of space for residents to freely walk down our high street. The pavement parking in Epsom & Ewell must stop. Sign my petition to change the law and stop pavement parking for good.
